variant: what results can i expect from tretinoin? hit me with the key numbers

request.message: what results can i expect from tretinoin? hit me with the key numbers

response_body.response: stack tretinoin with a gentle cleanser (cerave foaming works for your combo skin), and add azelaic acid once you're 4–6 weeks in to speed up redness and pih fade. skip manual exfoliation entirely on tretinoin — it's doing the work for you.

products.name: Paula's Choice Resist Daily Smoothing Treatment 5% AHA
products.description: 5% mandelic + lactic AHA — gentler entry exfoliant for darker skin tones.

products.name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
products.description: Foaming yet non-stripping — for oily/acne-prone skin types.

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: CeraVe Hydrating Facial Cleanser
products.description: Ceramide-based, fragrance-free, non-stripping — pairs with any active.
